subcodes.first_line: Verily, God hath heard the cry of His loved ones from every quarter, and His gaze hath remained fixed upon them in all conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ندآء احبائه من الاشطار و کان طرف الله متوجها الیهم فی کل الاحوال
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
